title: thalictrum expansum subsp. thamnophilum
intro: Thalictrum expansum subsp. thamnophilum, also known as Meadow Rue, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Ranunculaceae, characterized by its delicate, fern-like foliage and vibrant purple flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Meadow Rue can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
